display_text: Star Mace, Tier 3: Neutral item providing +10% movement speed, +1 mana regeneration, and a Cleave effect for melee attacks. Attacks deal 20% of attack damage in an expanding AoE behind the target, making it effective for accelerating farm and teamfight AoE damage for melee heroes. Stats: MS: +10%, Mana Regen: +1, Cleave Damage: 20%, Cleave Width: 150-360, Cleave Range: 650.
